mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO chat_room
name, avatar_url, description, owner_id, room_type, status, created_at, updated_at,
#{name}, #{avatarUrl}, #{description}, #{ownerId}, #{roomType}, #{status}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt},
mapper.select: SELECT r.id, r.name, r.avatar_url, r.description, r.owner_id, r.room_type, r.status, CASE WHEN m.user_id IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 END AS joined, (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM chat_room_member rm WHERE rm.room_id = r.id) AS member_count, CASE WHEN m.user_id IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE COALESCE((SELECT COUNT(1) FROM chat_message msg WHERE msg.room_id = r.id AND msg.status = 0 AND msg.sender_id != #{userId} AND (m.last_read_message_id IS NULL OR msg.id > m.last_read_message_id)), 0) END AS unread_count, (SELECT msg.content FROM chat_message msg WHERE msg.room_id = r.id AND msg.status = 0 ORDER BY msg.id DESC LIMIT 1) AS last_message, (SELECT msg.created_at FROM chat_message msg WHERE msg.room_id = r.id AND msg.status = 0 ORDER BY msg.id DESC LIMIT 1) AS last_message_at, r.created_at, r.updated_at FROM chat_room r LEFT JOIN chat_room_member m ON m.room_id = r.id AND m.user_id = #{userId} WHERE r.status = 0 ORDER BY COALESCE( (SELECT msg.created_at FROM chat_message msg WHERE msg.room_id = r.id AND msg.status = 0 ORDER BY msg.id DESC LIMIT 1), r.created_at ) DESC, r.id DESC
